title: Pseudo DB service with SQLite backend for pseudocode analysis
purpose: Provides database access and management for pseudocode files including full-text search, call graph analysis, and impact analysis using an in-memory SQLite database.
module_context: Exports PseudoDbV6Shim class and factory functions for database initialization and management. Includes type definitions for pseudocode file structures, search results, and analysis data. Uses singleton pattern for database instances with lazy initialization and automatic cleanup.

steps.content: Check if a cached instance exists for the project.
IF a cached instance exists, return it.
ELSE initialize a new database handle.
Create a new shim instance with the project and database handle.
Store the shim instance in the cache.
Return the new shim instance.

methods.name: probeSnapshotInputsV6
methods.normalized_params: (project: string): Promise<{ count: number; samples: Map<string, string> }>

steps.content: Spawn a git process to list tracked files.
Collect stdout data from the git process.
IF the git process fails, resolve with empty inputs.
IF the git process exits with non-zero code, resolve with empty inputs.
Parse the output to extract relative file paths.
IF no files are found, resolve with empty inputs.
Randomly select up to 5 files from the list.
Compute SHA1 hashes for the selected files.

methods.name: initPseudoDbV6
methods.normalized_params: (project: string, opts?: { attachWatcher?: boolean; attachDrift?: boolean }): PseudoDbV6Handle

steps.content: Check if an existing instance exists for the project.
IF an existing instance exists and is not disposed, return it.
Initialize database connection in memory.
Run legacy v1 database migration if present.
Run prose file migration to relative paths.
Create the database schema.
Initialize the pseudo indexer.
Initialize drift checker if enabled.
Initialize watcher if enabled.
Start the drift checker and watcher.
Attempt to load snapshot data if available.
Perform a full scan if snapshot loading fails or is not available.

methods.name: retryScan
methods.normalized_params: (): Promise<void>

steps.content: IF the handle is disposed, return immediately.
IF a recent failure occurred, return immediately.
IF a scan is already in flight, return immediately.
Set the state to cold-scanning.
Run a full scan using the indexer.
Set the state to ready upon successful completion.
Clear any previous error state.

methods.name: dispose
methods.normalized_params: (): Promise<void>

steps.content: IF the handle is already disposed, return immediately.
Mark the handle as disposed.
Stop the watcher if present.
Stop the drift checker if present.
Cancel the indexer.
Wait for any in-flight scan to complete.
Close the database connection.
Remove the instance from the v6 instances map.

methods.name: disposeAllPseudoDbV6
methods.normalized_params: (): Promise<void>

steps.content: Get all current v6 instances.
Dispose of each instance in parallel.
